mapper.select: Select ISNULL(Max(cast(CustomerNo AS int))+ 1, '0000000001') AS CustomerNo From XBOLTAPP.CRM_CUST_MST
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO XBOLTAPP.CRM_CUST_MST( CustomerNo, CustType, CustLvl, ParentNo, CustGRNo, TeamID, CustomerDesc, BizNo, BizTypeCode, BizItem, Active, CountryID, CEOName, CreationTime, RegUserID) VALUES( #{customerNo}, #{custType}, #{custLvl},
#{parentNo},
NULL,
#{custGRNo}, #{TeamID}, #{customerDesc}, #{bizNo}, #{bizType}, #{bizItem}, 1, #{countryID}, #{ceoName}, getDate(), #{userID} )

INSERT INTO XBOLTAPP.CRM_CUST_ADDR( CustomerNo, LanguageID, State, City, Addr1, Addr2, CreationTime, RegUserID) VALUES( #{customerNo}, #{languageID}, #{state}, #{city}, #{addr1}, #{addr2}, getDate(), #{userID} )
mapper.update: UPDATE XBOLTAPP.CRM_CUST_MST SET CustType = #{custType}, CustGRNo = #{custGRNo}, TeamID = #{TeamID}, CustomerDesc = #{customerDesc}, BizNo = #{bizNo}, BizTypeCode = #{bizType}, BizItem = #{bizItem}, CountryID = #{countryID}, CEOName = #{ceoName}, LastUpdated = getDate(), LastUser = #{userID}, CustLvl = #{custLvl}, ParentNo = #{parentNo} WHERE CustomerNo = #{customerNo}

UPDATE XBOLTAPP.CRM_CUST_ADDR SET State = #{state}, City = #{city}, Addr1 = #{addr1}, Addr2 = #{addr2}, LastUpdated = getDate(), LastUser = #{userID} WHERE CustomerNo = #{customerNo} AND LanguageID = ${languageID}
mapper.select: SELECT TCM.CustomerNo, TTX.Name As CustomerNM, TTX2.Name As CustomerNM_EN, TCM.CustGRNo, CASE WHEN TCM.CustType = 'CS' THEN 'Customer' ELSE 'Partner' END As CustType, TD.Name As CustLvlNM, TCM.BizNo, TCM.CEOName, TCM.BizTypeCode As BizType, TCM.BizItem, TC.Name As CountryName, TCM.CountryID, TCM.TeamID, TTX.Name As CompanyName, CONVERT(varchar(20), TCM.CreationTime, 111) As CreationTime, CONVERT(varchar(20), TCM.LastUpdated, 111) As LastUpdated, TM.Name As Creator, TCM.CustomerDesc, TCM.CustLvl, TCM.ParentNo, TCM.TeamID As CompanyID, TCA.State, TCA.City, TCA.Addr1, TCA.Addr2, TCA.State + ' ' + TCA.City + ' ' + TCA.Addr1 + ' ' + TCA.Addr2 As Address FROM XBOLTAPP.CRM_CUST_MST TCM LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM ON TCM.RegUserID = TM.MemberID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_COUNTRY TC ON TCM.CountryID = TC.CountryID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TTX ON TCM.TeamID = TTX.TeamID AND TTX.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TTX2 ON TCM.TeamID = TTX2.TeamID AND TTX2.LanguageID = '1033' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD ON TD.TypeCode = TCM.CustLvl AND TD.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TD.Category = 'CUSTTP' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTAPP.CRM_CUST_ADDR TCA ON TCM.CustomerNo = TCA.CustomerNo AND TCA.LanguageID = #{languageID} WHERE TCM.CustomerNo = #{customerNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM XBOLTAPP.CRM_CUST_MST WHERE TeamID = #{teamID} OR ParentNo = (SELECT CustomerNo FROM XBOLTAPP.CRM_CUST_MST WHERE TeamID = #{teamID})
mapper.select: Select ItemID From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM Where CompanyID = #{teamID}
